b:T6676,<div class="question">
<p>The graph shows the first six ionization energies of an element.</p>
<p style="text-align:center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align:center;"><sup>[Ionization energies of the elements (data page) Available at: <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ionization_energies_of_the_%20elements_(data_page)">https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ionization_energies_of_the_</a></sup><br/><sup><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ionization_energies_of_the_%20elements_(data_page)">elements_(data_page)</a> Text is available under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike License 3.0 (CC BY-SA</sup><br/><sup>3.0) <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/deed.en">https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/deed.en.</a>]</sup></p>
<p><br/>In which group is the element?</p>
<p>A.  13</p>
<p>B.  14</p>
<p>C.  15</p>
<p>D.  16</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/chemistry/topic/12/","children":["← back to ","Chemistry"," topic ","12"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.HL.TZ1.5"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Chemistry"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","12-1-electrons-in-atoms"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>A</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>A good number of candidates recognized the element based on the graph showing the first six ionization of the element.</p>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
